mano_cua.result_summary: svelte-tags-input是一个纯组件库（Svelte component library），仓库中没有demo/example应用，npm run dev仅为rollup watch模式编译组件源码，不启动dev server，无法在浏览器中加载测试页面
mano_cua.last_reasoning: This is a Svelte component library with only rollup build tooling. No demo app, no dev server, no index.html. npm run dev runs rollup -c -w (watch mode compilation only). Cannot serve a testable page in browser.
